name: PagerDuty API
description:
This document describes the PagerDuty REST APIs.

For guides and examples please visit our [Documentation.](https://developer.pagerduty.com/docs/get-started/getting-started/)

Our REST APIs are defined in OpenAPI v3.x. You can view the schema at [github.com/PagerDuty/api-schema](https://github.com/PagerDuty/api-schema).

Note that properties in some schemas have fields not shown by default such as `readOnly`, `format`, and `default`.

capabilities.name: tags
capabilities.description: Manage tags — create a tag, assign tags, list tags. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: abilities
capabilities.description: Manage abilities — list abilities, test an ability. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: add_ons
capabilities.description: Manage add ons — install an add-on, update an add-on, list installed add-ons. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: alert_grouping_settings
capabilities.description: Manage alert grouping settings — create an alert grouping setting, update an alert grouping setting, list alert grouping settings. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: analytics
capabilities.description: Manage analytics — get aggregated incident data, get aggregated escalation policy data, get aggregated metrics for all escalation policies. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: audit
capabilities.description: Manage audit — list audit records. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: automation_actions
capabilities.description: Manage automation actions — create an automation action, create an automation action runner, create an invocation. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: business_services
capabilities.description: Manage business services — create a business service, create business service account subscription, create business service subscribers. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: change_events
capabilities.description: Manage change events — create a change event, update a change event, list change events. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: escalation_policies
capabilities.description: Manage escalation policies — create an escalation policy, update an escalation policy, list escalation policies. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: event_orchestrations
capabilities.description: Manage event orchestrations — create an orchestration, create an integration for an event orchestration, migrate an integration from one event orchestration to another. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: extension_schemas
capabilities.description: Manage extension schemas — list extension schemas, get an extension vendor. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
